Included as a light seasoning estimate; users can reduce salt to taste.

detail.zhHant: Set out Mushrooms, Pasta, Eggplant, Canned tomatoes, Parmesan, heat the oven, and cut everything into bite-size pieces so the tray or baking dish cooks at the same pace.
detail.yue: Set out Mushrooms, Pasta, Eggplant, Canned tomatoes, Parmesan, heat the oven, and cut everything into bite-size pieces so the tray or baking dish cooks at the same pace.
detail.en: Set out Mushrooms, Pasta, Eggplant, Canned tomatoes, Parmesan, heat the oven, and cut everything into bite-size pieces so the tray or baking dish cooks at the same pace.

detail.zhHant: Toss Mushrooms with onion, garlic, vegetables, and the seasoning base; spread in one even layer instead of piling the center too high.
detail.yue: Toss Mushrooms with onion, garlic, vegetables, and the seasoning base; spread in one even layer instead of piling the center too high.
detail.en: Toss Mushrooms with onion, garlic, vegetables, and the seasoning base; spread in one even layer instead of piling the center too high.

detail.zhHant: Bake until the top is lightly browned and the center is hot, stirring once if the edges color faster than the middle of the dish.
detail.yue: Bake until the top is lightly browned and the center is hot, stirring once if the edges color faster than the middle of the dish.
detail.en: Bake until the top is lightly browned and the center is hot, stirring once if the edges color faster than the middle of the dish.

detail.zhHant: Rest Mushroom Rustic Pasta Bake for 5 minutes before serving so the juices settle and each plate gets a balanced mix of staple, vegetables, and main ingredient.
detail.yue: Rest Mushroom Rustic Pasta Bake for 5 minutes before serving so the juices settle and each plate gets a balanced mix of staple, vegetables, and main ingredient.
detail.en: Rest Mushroom Rustic Pasta Bake for 5 minutes before serving so the juices settle and each plate gets a balanced mix of staple, vegetables, and main ingredient.
